name: Modern Links
address: 200 Wilson St Suite E6A, Port Jefferson Station, NY 11776
about: Modern Links is a 24/7 indoor golf center located in Port Jefferson Station, NY. The venue features three golf simulators, a putting green with Puttview technology, and an on-site PGA professional for coaching. It operates on a membership model, offering tiered plans that provide varying levels of access to the facility and its amenities. The business emphasizes convenience and expert coaching for golfers looking to practice and improve their game on their own schedule.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access allows for practice at any time
On-site PGA professional for expert coaching
Cutting-edge technology including Puttview on the putting green
Multiple simulator bays for group or individual play
Tiered membership options for various commitment levels

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of bar or alcohol service
